title: Final review gate and release recommendation

code_quality_semantic_checks._clickhouse_datetime: pass - uses UTC normalization and emits '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%f' trimmed to milliseconds with no timezone suffix
code_quality_semantic_checks.snapshot_assertions: pass - tests assert normalized sample_time_utc for both direct workflow and service paths

qa_coverage.happy_path_runtime_validation: pass - task-4-runtime-verify.log records targeted pytest commands for snapshot normalization + service guard flows and reports no parse crashes
qa_coverage.guarded_malformed_input: pass - task-4-runtime-verify-error.log preserves the original ClickHouse DateTime parse failure as a controlled malformed timestamp scenario
qa_coverage.regression_risk_statement: no user-visible regression indicated because valid runtime paths pass while the known failure remains reproducible only in guarded malformed-input coverage

recommendation: go - deploy hotfix; scope fidelity confirmed for timestamp normalization, workflow/service regressions, and runtime verification with no sample_time_utc parse failure and +00:00 guard coverage
reason: Plan deliverables are fully represented across code, tests, and evidence: normalized ClickHouse-safe timestamps are emitted, regression coverage explicitly guards against +00:00 format leakage, and runtime verification shows no DateTime parse failure on the production path.
